TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Patrick_Beverley, title = Patrick_Beverley, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Patrick_Beverley} }

S.FORM: Patrick Beverley hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 7, Patrick Beverley, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Patrick Beverley hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 7, Patrick Beverley, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: patriʦ~ʨk βe*erlej ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaras~ɕ mariʔ tpuʦ~ʨiŋ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, patriʦ~ʨk βe*erlej, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
